info: Healed data is logged in telemetry_records.

name: Convert + return null if not boolean
Strip Timestamp
Strip Timestamp + Format into 15 Fields
info:
Possible cases:

All 15 fields, serial/MQTT — normal, never log (serial expects no timestamp)
All 15 fields, CSV — log once on first occurrence
All 16 fields, valid timestamps — no log
16 fields, corrupted/blank timestamp — log every occurrence
Row 0 = 16 valid, later row = 15 — log when it first drops (flag not set yet)
Row 0 = 15, rows 1+ = 16 valid — log on row 0, rows 1+ use real timestamps
Row 0 = 16 corrupted, row 1 = 16 valid — log on row 0, row 1 recovers correctly
